field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: If the composition of the two solvents is 92/8 vol %, these conditions are obtained for a temperature of 29 C. In this case all 1,4-PI samples elute at the same retention volume irrespective of their molar masses.
field_evidence.column_name: three reversed phase Nucleosil C18 columns (100-5, 300-5, and 1000-7)
field_evidence.mobile_phase_solvents: The mobile phase was a mixture of butanone and cyclohexane.

conditions.notes: The text states that 1,4-PI samples elute at the same retention volume irrespective of molar mass under these conditions. The samples are copolymers containing predominantly 1,4- and 3,4-isoprene units, but the critical condition is established for the 1,4-isoprene moiety.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: Wolf Hiller; Harald Pasch; Thorsten Hofe
